creator: nobutaka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 185571
eterm.diff

Package build of x11/eterm and japanese/eterm fails on current because share/Eterm/gdb.scr is missing. This build failure is caused by path change of gdb from /usr/bin/gdb to /usr/libexec/gdb on current.

The attached patch fixes the build failure.
